scope.description: Space-separated list of OAuth scopes granted to this access token.

resource.description:
The resource associated with this access token. Null when
the token has no associated resource.

type.description: The type of resource associated with the access token, e.g. `Company` for a company-level token or `Oauth::Application` for a system-level token.

uuid.description: The UUID of the associated resource

resource_owner.description:
The resource owner (user) who authorized this access token. Null for
system-level tokens or when the owner cannot be determined.

type.description:
The type of resource owner:
- `CompanyAdmin`: A company administrator
- `Employee`: An employee
- `Contractor`: A contractor

uuid.description: The UUID of the resource owner
